info.description: Your business name, tagline, contact details, and social links — used everywhere across the site (header, footer, contact page, buttons, page titles).

name.description: Full business name, e.g. "IT Solutions Trade & Service"

shortName.description: Short version shown in the header logo and tight spaces, e.g. "IT Solutions"

tagline.description: One-line slogan shown under your name in places like the browser tab title

description.description: 1-2 sentence summary of what you do — shown in the footer and used for SEO

phone.description: Main phone number, shown in the header and footer

whatsapp.description: WhatsApp number with country code, e.g. +923001234567 — no spaces

email.description: Main contact email, shown in the header and footer

addressLine1.description: Street address / shop or office address

storeUrl.description: Link to your online store — used by every "Visit Our Store" / "Shop Now" button

foundingYear.description: The year the business was founded — used to auto-calculate "Years of Experience"
